hero_description: Master the art and science of interior decoration and POP (Plaster of Paris) ceiling work. This foundation course trains you to create beautiful, functional interior spaces using modern techniques and traditional craftsmanship. Perfect for anyone wanting to start a career in India's booming construction and interior design industry.
overview_description: Learn professional interior decoration skills including wall finishes, POP ceiling installation, false ceiling design, color theory, space planning, and finishing touches. This hands-on course covers both residential and commercial projects, preparing you for immediate employment or self-employment in India's growing construction sector.

modules.title: Fundamentals of Interior Decoration & POP Work
topics: Introduction to interior decoration industry in India — career opportunities, market demand, growth trends
Understanding POP (Plaster of Paris) — composition, types, grades, and applications in construction
Safety and personal protective equipment (PPE) — helmets, gloves, masks, safety shoes, eye protection
Tools and equipment identification — trowels, floats, mixers, scaffolding, measuring instruments
Basic mathematics for construction — measurements, calculations, area and perimeter, material estimation
Introduction to interior spaces — residential, commercial, institutional, industrial applications
Quality standards and building codes — Indian Standards (IS), National Building Code (NBC) compliance
Environmental awareness and sustainable interior practices — eco-friendly materials, waste management
Health hazards in POP work — dust control, ventilation requirements, ergonomics
Introduction to design principles — balance, proportion, color harmony, space utilization

modules.title: Surface Preparation & Wall Finishing Techniques
topics: Wall surface assessment and preparation — cleaning, leveling, moisture checking, crack repair
Plastering basics — cement plaster composition, sand grades, water quality, mixing ratios
Single coat and double coat plastering techniques — application methods, thickness standards
Putty application — types of putty, application tools, finishing smooth surfaces
Sanding and smoothing techniques — sandpaper grades, hand sanding vs machine sanding, dust control
Paint primer selection and application — types of primers, coverage calculation, application methods
Texture finishes — spray texture, roller texture, brush texture, design variations
Wall finishes — matte, glossy, semi-gloss finishes, paint quality standards
Moisture and water-proofing — dampness identification, waterproofing coatings, prevention measures
Common defects and remedies — peeling, cracking, blistering, efflorescence, solutions

modules.title: POP Ceiling Installation & False Ceiling Systems
topics: False ceiling systems overview — suspended ceilings, drop ceilings, grid systems, advantages
POP ceiling materials — POP boards, gypsum boards, acoustic panels, metal frames, suspension systems
Ceiling design and planning — layout drawings, measurement techniques, load calculations
Grid and frame installation — metal channel fixing, suspension wire installation, leveling procedures
POP board cutting and installation — cutting techniques, joining methods, fastening systems
Finishing POP ceilings — joint filling, sanding, painting, texture application
Decorative ceiling designs — cove ceilings, coffered ceilings, tray ceilings, curved designs
Lighting integration in false ceilings — recessed lights, LED strips, downlights, wiring safety
Acoustic ceilings — sound absorption properties, installation methods, maintenance
Common ceiling defects and troubleshooting — sagging, cracking, water damage, repair procedures
Cost estimation for ceiling work — material quantity calculation, labor estimation, project budgeting
Safety in height work — scaffolding safety, fall protection, working at heights regulations

modules.title: Color Theory, Design Principles & Space Planning
topics: Color theory fundamentals — primary, secondary, tertiary colors, color wheel, color psychology
Color combinations — complementary, analogous, triadic, monochromatic color schemes
Color selection for different spaces — living rooms, bedrooms, kitchens, bathrooms, commercial spaces
Lighting effects on colors — natural light, artificial light, color rendering index (CRI), light temperature
Space planning principles — traffic flow, furniture arrangement, scale and proportion
Small space optimization — visual tricks, storage solutions, multi-functional design
Design styles — modern, traditional, minimalist, industrial, eclectic, fusion styles
Texture and material selection — wall textures, flooring materials, fabric combinations
Creating mood and atmosphere — warm vs cool spaces, formal vs casual designs
Client consultation and requirement gathering — understanding client needs, budget planning, timeline

modules.title: Decorative Elements, Finishes & Specialty Work
topics: Wall paneling — wooden panels, PVC panels, fiber panels, installation techniques
Wallpaper application �� types of wallpaper, surface preparation, pasting techniques, finishing
Decorative paint techniques — faux finishes, stenciling, sponging, ragging, color washing
Tile work basics — ceramic tiles, porcelain tiles, natural stone, adhesive selection, grouting
Cornice and crown molding — design variations, installation methods, finishing touches
Wall art and murals — hand-painted designs, stencil designs, mural installation
Glass and mirror work — mirror placement, glass partitions, safety considerations
Wooden flooring — types, installation, finishing, maintenance
Carpet and soft flooring — carpet selection, installation, care and maintenance
Specialty finishes — metallic finishes, pearl finishes, eco-friendly paints, anti-bacterial coatings

modules.title: Project Execution, Costing & Professional Development
topics: Project planning and scheduling — timeline creation, resource allocation, milestone tracking
Material estimation and procurement — quantity calculation, vendor selection, quality checking
Labor management and teamwork — team coordination, quality supervision, progress monitoring
Cost estimation and quotation — material costs, labor costs, overhead, profit margin calculation
Project documentation — site plans, progress photos, client communication, warranty details
Quality control and inspection — defect identification, rectification procedures, final inspection
Client communication and feedback — handling complaints, modifications, customer satisfaction
Business basics for self-employment — registration, GST, pricing strategies, marketing
Portfolio development — documenting work, before-after photos, client testimonials
Continuous learning — industry trends, new materials, advanced techniques, professional certifications

assessment.theory_format: 25 Questions x 2 Marks (Multiple Choice and Short Answer)
assessment.practical_format: Hands-on demonstration of POP ceiling installation, wall finishing, and decorative application with quality and time assessment

practical_items.title: POP Ceiling Installation & Finishing
practical_items.description: Candidate must install a false ceiling with POP boards on a 4x4 feet grid, including proper joint filling, sanding, and painting. Assessment includes accuracy of installation, leveling, joint finishing quality, and overall appearance.

practical_items.title: Wall Finishing & Texture Application
practical_items.description: Candidate must prepare a wall surface, apply putty, sand smoothly, apply primer and paint with chosen texture finish on a 2x3 feet wall section. Assessment includes surface smoothness, texture uniformity, paint coverage, and professional finish.

practical_items.title: Decorative Design Implementation
practical_items.description: Candidate must design and execute a decorative element such as a painted mural, stencil design, or decorative finish on a 2x2 feet surface. Assessment includes design creativity, color harmony, precision, and artistic quality.

eligibility: Minimum age: 14 years (with parental consent for 14-16 age group)
Minimum education: Class 8th pass or equivalent
No prior experience needed — beginners welcome
Already working in interior decoration? Apply for direct RPL (Recognition of Prior Learning) exam
Valid government ID proof required (Aadhaar, PAN, Voter ID, or Passport)
Medical fitness certificate may be required for height work
Applicable for all candidates regardless of gender, caste, religion, or background
learning_outcomes: Understand and apply safety standards and best practices in interior decoration and POP work
Prepare surfaces and execute professional wall finishes including plastering, putty, and painting
Install and finish false ceilings with POP boards, grid systems, and decorative designs
Apply color theory and design principles to create aesthetically pleasing interior spaces
Execute decorative finishes and specialty work including textures, murals, and artistic elements
Plan, estimate costs, and manage interior decoration projects from conception to completion

certification_details.certificate_issued_by: CETCF (Council for Education, Training & Certification Foundation)
certification_details.additional_benefits: Job placement assistance, skill upgrade pathways, industry network access

industry_context.market_overview: India's construction industry is growing at 8-10% annually. Interior decoration and POP work are essential components of residential and commercial projects. Urban development, real estate boom, and increasing focus on aesthetic interiors have created massive demand for skilled professionals in this sector.
industry_context.skill_shortage: There is a significant shortage of trained POP and interior decoration professionals in India. Many projects face delays due to unavailability of skilled workers. This creates excellent opportunities for certified professionals.
growth_areas: Tier-2 and Tier-3 cities experiencing rapid construction growth

course_structure_details.delivery_method: Blended learning - Classroom theory + Hands-on practical training
course_structure_details.batch_size: Maximum 15 students per batch for quality training
course_structure_details.training_tools_provided: All tools, materials, and equipment provided by institute
course_structure_details.trainer_qualifications: Minimum 5 years industry experience, certified trainers

placement_support.job_assistance: Job placement assistance provided for top performers
placement_support.industry_connections: Direct connections with construction companies and interior design firms
placement_support.alumni_network: Access to alumni network for referrals and opportunities
placement_support.skill_upgrade_pathways: Advanced courses available after foundation level
